title: astragalus ochrochlorus
intro: Astragalus ochrochlorus, also known as Huangqi, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to boost the immune system and improve overall health. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its rich content of saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often used to enhance immune function, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
